calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-050 MEL-measurability diagnostic (recon-only P0 base + frozen fixed-probe MEL battery; supersedes 701b). Builds the MEL battery on the RECON-ONLY P0 warmup -- the 701b-ablation-validated converged base (recon-only 3/3 vs recon+contrastive 1/3; SD-056 contrastive auxiliary isolated as the P0 destabiliser) -- and re-runs 701b's frozen fixed-probe instrument. R2 (world_model_converged on the FROZEN battery, >=2/3 seeds) GATES R1/C1. Tests whether accumulated waking prediction-error is a measurable, graded, monotonic quantity under graded env-drift novelty.
items.note: diagnostic; PROMOTES NOTHING (INV-050 stays candidate / pending_substrate_reconfirmation; diagnostic = scoring-excluded). Routing per confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-701b_2026-06-29: 701b R2 FAILed on the FIXED frozen battery (conv_frac 0.333, 1/3 seeds) -- a GENUINE multi-seed world-forward divergence (exploration-drift confound removed), NOT a metric artifact and NOT an INV-050 ceiling. A matched 2-arm ablation (identical init + same probe battery; only the SD-056 contrastive term differs) isolated the destabiliser: recon-only P0 converged 3/3 (frac 1.0, drops ~0.97-0.98, PE ~1.4e-4) vs recon+contrastive 1/3 -> destabiliser_verdict=sd056_contrastive_is_destabiliser. 701c MAIN cells therefore train P0 recon-ONLY (use_contrastive=False; the SD-056 contrastive aux is OMITTED from the P0 loss). Agent config is BYTE-IDENTICAL to 701b's _make_agent (contrastive HEAD stays enabled for world_forward module parity with the proven-converging recon-only ablation arm; only the loss TERM is dropped). The frozen fixed-probe convergence metric + raw per-step e3 prediction_error MEL accumulator + R1 novelty-shock positive-control probe are UNCHANGED. The separate recipe ablation is NOT re-run (its destabiliser question is settled + autopsy-confirmed); the per-seed R2 gate over the 12 recon-only cells is itself the multi-seed convergence certification. INTERPRETATION: R2 fail here = the 701b autopsy BRAKE-LOCK condition (recon-only base, which converged 3/3 in the ablation, ALSO failing -> genuine recon-primary divergence -> FIRE the INV-050 re-derive brake + /implement-substrate world-forward stabilisation). R2 met + R1 met + C1 FAIL (flat MEL) = the GENUINE MEL-measurability ceiling -> substrate enrichment + re-derive brake. R2 met + R1 met + C1 PASS (monotonic MEL) = INV-050 IV precondition MET, unblocks the deferred adaptive sleep-cadence enrichment. Re-derive brake NOT fired at queue time (re_derive_brake.fired=false in the 701b autopsy: successive instrument repairs + a demonstrably-converging recon-only base, user-confirmed; locks only if THIS recon-only base also fails). Commitment-free (sleep_used=false). NO separate baseline mint queued: this is a single-recipe diagnostic test-bed whose P0 recipe has re-tuned every letter (701->701a->701b->701c), so the lineage's OFF/base path is genuinely in flux and the arm-reuse fingerprint would correctly refuse a drifted mint (disqualifier #2); the in-run self-mint via arm_cell still emits per cell (free). prefer-cloud. Smoke: --dry-run PASS 4/4 arms exit 0 2026-06-29 (recon-only R2 conv_frac=1.00 even in the 1-seed dry env; self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue on R1<floor in the collapsed dry env, expected); validate_experiments --strict OK; validate_queue OK.
